uplink.description: 8911EX vibration frame (fPort 1): RMS acceleration, FFT peak list, temperature, battery
uplink._note: Upstream-example input (TheThingsNetwork 89xxex-codec.yaml, Apache-2.0); expected.data authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle method) and mapping to the vocabulary. Although peak_nb=8, the upstream peak loop guard ((i*5+5) < (bytes.length-8)) emits only 7 peaks for this 48-byte frame; reproduced faithfully. sig_rms 0.011 g -> vibration.accelerationRms (satisfies the vibration atLeastOne).

uplink.description: 8911EX frame with temperature-sensor error (0x7FFF) and peak count clamped by frame length
uplink._note: Synthetic; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js. temp uint16 LE = 0x7FFF -> sensor error: air.temperature is omitted and a warning is emitted (warnings not asserted by the suite). peak_nb=2 but the upstream length guard yields only 1 peak from this 18-byte frame; reproduced faithfully. accelerationRms 0.2 g satisfies the vibration atLeastOne.

uplink.description: Unsupported fPort (firmware-revision frame, fPort 2) -> error, no normalized measurement
uplink._note: Synthetic; the upstream universal_decoder routes fPort 2 to DecodeFwRevision (a non-measurement frame). We do not normalize non-vibration frames, so we return an error rather than fabricating measurement keys.
